understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to place all selectable pieces onto the '+' goal tiles simultaneously. The level is won only when every goal tile is occupied by a piece.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: A cursor or player moves with MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN actions through an empty grid, blocked by walls. CLICK selects a piece (if clicked on a piece) and then clicking on an unoccupied tile moves that piece there. If a goal is already occupied, the piece might not be able to be placed again. The repeated identical action suggests that placing a piece on a single goal was insufficient if multiple goals existed, or the piece returned to its original spot because the placement was invalid (e.g., occupied goal not satisfying all conditions). Pushing mechanics may exist but were not observed in this run.
